creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Tag your loved one and plan your trip to this romantic attraction in the Philippines! 💕

The Ruins is one of the tourist destinations in my home province. The landmark features the remains of a mansion built by Don Mariano Ledesma Lacson for his wife Maria Braga.

It is a structure created out of love and ruined because of a war, but has lived to tell the tale! 

📍The Ruins, Talisay City 

🎟️ Entrance Fee
* Adult: 150 PHP
* Senior Citizen: 100 PHP
* Children below 8 yrs old: free

🕚 Visiting Hours:
* 11 AM to 8 PM

⚠️ Prices and timings are as of March 2023. Please check @theruinsnegros for updates before your trip.

👗 from @passionprjct.ae

transcription.text: I would never fall in love again until I found her I said I would never fall unless it's you I fall into
